creator: nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de
text:
I guess we need to find out why the existing libfreetype.so.6
doesn't get picked up, could you ktrace it?  (ktrace -di googleearth,
then install linux_kdump for which you can use a package:
	pkg_add -rv ftp://ftp.freebsd.org:/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-6-stable/All/linux_kdump-1.5_2.tbz
and run linux_kdump |less and look for where it tries to access
libfreetype.so.6 - mine ultimately finds
	19129 googleearth-bin NAMI  "/compat/linux/usr/lib/libfreetype.so.6"
	19129 googleearth-bin RET   linux_open 3
and successfully invokes firefox.)
